reasoning: The flagged Docker-related files are test/CI infrastructure not executed during package build/installation. Qwen's findings are false positives for non-build components, while DeepSeek correctly analyzed build-relevant files.
disagreement_analysis: Qwen flagged test infrastructure (Dockerfile/execute_test.sh) as unsafe while DeepSeek didn't review them. These files aren't executed during makepkg/installation.
coverage_issues: DeepSeek missed Docker-related files (low priority as they're not build-relevant)
false_positives: execute_test.sh: Test script not invoked by PKGBUILD/build process
Dockerfile: CI/test infrastructure not used during package installation
learnings: Improve file prioritization to focus on PKGBUILD-referenced files
Train models to better distinguish build-time vs non-build-time artifacts
Add build process analysis to exclude test/CI files from security impact
